what_it_does: Defines a 24x24 SVG line icon showing a building with small horizontal window marks and a circled dollar symbol to its right.
observations: Uses an inline SVG with viewBox, width, height, fill, stroke, stroke width, stroke linecap, and stroke linejoin attributes.
Draws the building body and three window marks in a single path.
Draws the money marker as a circle centered at 17,14 with radius 4.
Draws the dollar sign inside the circle with vertical, horizontal, and arc path commands.
Uses currentColor for stroke so the icon color inherits from surrounding text or CSS.
standouts: Combines a building silhouette with a separate circled currency marker.
Uses compact path data rather than separate elements for each building detail.
conventions: Follows a monochrome stroke-icon convention with fill set to none.
Uses rounded line caps and joins.
Keeps styling attributes on the root svg element.
concerns: No title, description, role, or aria attributes are included, so semantic meaning depends on surrounding usage.
notes: This file is a reusable currentColor SVG icon for building-related monetary concepts.
questions: Should accessibility labeling be supplied by consumers or embedded in the SVG asset?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename indicates a building-dollar icon, and the SVG content matches that purpose.
intention_signals: It seems intended to represent a building or property associated with money, payments, revenue, or cost.
novelty: The dollar symbol is placed inside a separate circular badge overlapping the building composition rather than being integrated into the building itself.
contribution: Contributes a reusable 24x24 currentColor line icon for financial property or building-money concepts, with simple geometry suitable for theme-driven UI coloring.
summary_for_embedding: A 24x24 currentColor SVG stroke icon depicting a building with window marks and a circled dollar sign.
intention_for_embedding: This asset was for visually labeling building-related financial actions, values, accounts, or metrics.
